---
title: "DI-2022 @ KDD 2022: Accepted Papers"
description: "Accepted papers for the 3rd Document Intelligence Workshop @ KDD 2022."
author: "synesis"
date: "2022-06-26"
categories: [NLP, NLU, conference]
image: cover.jpg
---

![DI-2022 @ KDD 2022. Image from [DI workshop](https://document-intelligence.github.io/DI-2022/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Announcing the accepted papers to the 3rd Document Intelligence Workshop @ KDD2022 (DI-2022)! Congratulations to the authors!

* DI-2022 accepted papers: <https://document-intelligence.github.io/DI-2022/papers/>
* DI-2022 website: <https://document-intelligence.github.io/DI-2022/>

* Program Committee Chair: Ani Nenkova (Adobe)
* Organizing committee: Doug Burdick (IBM Research),  Benjamin Han (Microsoft), Dave Lewis (Redgrave Data),  Sandeep Tata (Google ), and Dan Tecuci (EY).

* Previous year (DI-2021): <https://document-intelligence.github.io/DI-2021/>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_kdd2022-documentintelligence-nlp-activity-6947045385332789248-OaVF).*
